title: When is misalignment just a bug?
summary: When is misalignment just a bug?
whyItMatters: Cross-posted from The Foretellix CTO Blog . Introduction and epistemic status: This is the first post in a planned series, “Alignment as a verification problem”. I co-originated coverage-driven verification ( CDV ), which became the standard methodology for chip verification and is heavily used in AV safety. Back in 2015 I wrote that verifying “Friendly AI”…
